preview:
  Run generating preview data.

Usage:
  Kros.DummyData.Initializer preview [options]

Options:
  -s, --source <source>    Directory where the initialization data is located. [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-kros.dummydata.initializer-1.12.2-9936f8cd50e54e7dada01524e7895b51]
  -d, --dest <dest>        Directory where the generated data will be saved. [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-kros.dummydata.initializer-1.12.2-9936f8cd50e54e7dada01524e7895b51/output]
  -v, --verbose            Verbose [default: False]
  -c, --compress           Compress content [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
